description_long: This is a modern, armless chaise with a rectangular profile and a minimalist design, featuring a tan upholstered seat and backrest. The upholstery is segmented into a grid pattern with visible tufting, giving it a structured and contemporary look. The backrest and seat are both thickly padded, providing comfort and support, and are seamlessly integrated without any visible separation. The base and legs are constructed from black metal, with a sleek, open frame that elevates the seat above the ground. The legs are straight and slightly angled, contributing to the overall stability and modern aesthetic. The rear of the chaise is finished with a solid black panel, contrasting with the tan upholstery and enhancing its visual appeal.
description: A modern, armless tan chaise with tufted upholstery and a black metal frame, featuring a grid pattern and sleek, straight legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tan tufted seat and backrest, with the black metal legs visible below.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the angled black metal frame supporting the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black panel covering the back of the chaise and the straight metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the seat and backrest with the black frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, straight, and features a grid of square tufted segments, giving it a structured and modern appearance. It is thickly padded and seamlessly integrated with the seat, with no visible curvature or decorative cutouts.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, with a slight outward angle for stability. They have a minimalist, industrial look with no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is tan and features a geometric grid pattern created by square tufting, giving the surface a quilted, structured appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, continuous cushion for both the seat and backrest, both of which are attached and integrated into the frame. The cushion is thick and evenly padded, with no loose or separate cushions visible.
